items.title: E-commerce giant Alibaba sues US government over defence blacklist
items.dek: The e-commerce giant is suing the US defence department after it was added to a blacklist of firms with ties to the Chinese military.
items.body: The e-commerce giant is suing the US defence department after it was added to a blacklist of firms with ties to the Chinese military.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Stanford was their golden ticket - could AI help or hinder that?
items.dek: The BBC spoke with Stanford University graduates about what they really think about artificial intelligence.
items.body: The BBC spoke with Stanford University graduates about what they really think about artificial intelligence.

items.title: Germany rail network comes to complete halt due to IT malfunction
items.dek: Rail company Deutsche Bahn has paused train services across the country due to a nationwide IT disruption.
items.body: Rail company Deutsche Bahn has paused train services across the country due to a nationwide IT disruption.
items.author: IriLine Desk
